The following is a list of peer-reviewed academic papers. None of the journals listed below is controlled by a publisher listed in Jeffrey Beall's list.

2023

Kastrup, B. (2023). The Collapse of Materialism. Journal of Consciousness Studies, 30(3–4), 1–21. DOI: 10.53765/20700121.30.34.001 [Link]

Kastrup, B. (2023). Analytic Idealism and the Problem of Other Minds. Philosophies, 8(2), 22. doi: 10.3390/philosophies8020022 PDF

2022

Kastrup, B. & Woollacott, M. (2022). Is the Idea of Physicalism Coherent? A Formal Analysis. Entropy, 24(8), 1093. doi: 10.3390/e24081093 [PDF]

Kastrup, B. (2022). On the Plausibility of Idealism. Synthese, 200, 1–21. doi: 10.1007/s11229-022-03861-9

Kastrup, B. (2022). May 2022 Update: Consciousness and the Brain. Neuroscience of Consciousness, 2022(1), niac006. doi: 10.1093/nc/niac006 PDF

2021

  • Kastrup, B. (2021). What is Matter to an Idealist? Journal of Consciousness Studies, 28(9–10), 44–63. DOI: 10.53765/20700121.28.9.044 [Link]
